title: Monitor animals in intensive production systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor animals in intensive production systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor animal health status

pcs.text: Identify animal health program information from the livestock production plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify animal health program information from the livestock production plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify animal health program information from the livestock production plans.

pcs.text: Assess animal health status by routinely inspecting each animal from induction to despatch by having unimpeded access and opportunity to observe behavioural characteristics, signs of ill-health and freedom of movement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess animal health status by routinely inspecting each animal from induction to despatch by having unimpeded access and opportunity to observe behavioural characteristics, signs of ill-health and freedom of movement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess animal health status by routinely inspecting each animal from induction to despatch by having unimpeded access and opportunity to observe behavioural characteristics, signs of ill-health and freedom of movement.

pcs.text: Source information on past treatment from the individual animal identification tag or identification marking and workplace records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source information on past treatment from the individual animal identification tag or identification marking and workplace records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source information on past treatment from the individual animal identification tag or identification marking and workplace records.

pcs.text: Identify husbandry practices appropriate for the health status of the individual animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify husbandry practices appropriate for the health status of the individual animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify husbandry practices appropriate for the health status of the individual animal.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor animal health status

elements.title: Identify animals requiring treatment

pcs.text: Identify individual animals with potential health issues or in ill health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify individual animals with potential health issues or in ill health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify individual animals with potential health issues or in ill health.

pcs.text: Determine the type and severity of infection or injury and identify or isolate affected animals requiring treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the type and severity of infection or injury and identify or isolate affected animals requiring treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the type and severity of infection or injury and identify or isolate affected animals requiring treatment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify animals requiring treatment

elements.title: Determine the type and scope of treatment

pcs.text: Determine the need for, type and scope of treatment by seeking expert or veterinary advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the need for, type and scope of treatment by seeking expert or veterinary advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the need for, type and scope of treatment by seeking expert or veterinary advice.

pcs.text: Prepare equipment, materials and treatment site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare equipment, materials and treatment site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare equipment, materials and treatment site.

pcs.text: Identify work hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Record treatment batch numbers, date of expiry, withholding periods and other details of treatment according to regulations and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record treatment batch numbers, date of expiry, withholding periods and other details of treatment according to regulations and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record treatment batch numbers, date of expiry, withholding periods and other details of treatment according to regulations and workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine the type and scope of treatment

elements.title: Administer treatment

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Handle and restrain animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and restrain animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and restrain animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Administer treatment according to chemical label or veterinary advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer treatment according to chemical label or veterinary advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer treatment according to chemical label or veterinary advice.

pcs.text: Identify treated animals from non-treated animals to ensure compliance with the required withholding period (WHP)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify treated animals from non-treated animals to ensure compliance with the required withholding period (WHP)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify treated animals from non-treated animals to ensure compliance with the required withholding period (WHP).

pcs.text: Prepare and move treated animals as planned
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and move treated animals as planned?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and move treated animals as planned.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Administer treatment

elements.title: Carry out post-treatment procedures

pcs.text: Monitor animal health and condition post-treatment and report on animal’s progress
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor animal health and condition post-treatment and report on animal’s progress?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor animal health and condition post-treatment and report on animal’s progress.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise environmental impacts associated with the administration of treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise environmental impacts associated with the administration of treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise environmental impacts associated with the administration of treatment.

pcs.text: Clean equipment and worksite, and dispose of organic and non-organic waste according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean equipment and worksite, and dispose of organic and non-organic waste according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean equipment and worksite, and dispose of organic and non-organic waste according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Return materials and unused medications to store according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return materials and unused medications to store according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return materials and unused medications to store according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record animal treatment process and outcomes including withholding periods according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record animal treatment process and outcomes including withholding periods according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record animal treatment process and outcomes including withholding periods according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Apply workplace biosecurity policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace biosecurity policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace biosecurity policies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Carry out post-treatment procedures
